case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. SAM ENCISO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENCISO, SAM $1,035.00 PRINCIPAL, $990.33 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,025.33
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2010 - JUDGMENT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENCISO, SAM $989.50 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,035.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
